name: musclebeachtools
summary: This package used to analyze neuron data, from basic plotting               (ISI histograms, firing rate, cross corr), to hard core               computational work (ising models, branching ratios, etc).
maintainer: Kiran Bhaskaran-Nair, Sahara Ensley, Keith Hengen,           (Hengen Lab Washington University in St. Louis)
author: Keith Hengen, Sahara Ensley, Kiran Bhaskaran-Nair           (Hengen Lab Washington University in St. Louis)
